content.en:
Rumble!!!!!

Lin Yun was knocked away.

This meant that Lin Yun was at a disadvantage, and those reincarnation celestials who bet on Lin Yun frowned.

Once Lin Yun loses, the reincarnation coins they bet on are gone.

And the Reincarnation Heavenly Pavilion doesn't care who wins and who loses, no matter who wins, the Reincarnation Heavenly Pavilion will make a lot of money.

Soon, Lin Yun completely fell into disadvantage.

After a while, Ye Tian defeated Lin Yun strongly and won the victory.

At the end of the competition, Ye Tian obtained a lot of Reincarnation Heavenly Coins from the Reincarnation Heavenly Pavilion, and he made a lot of money this time.

And Ao Chen has also been discussed by many reincarnation celestial clans, and even attracted the attention of the high-level leaders of the reincarnation celestial clan.

But Ye Tian was not worried about anything, and he was not afraid of exposing himself.

Soon.

He began to apply for a leapfrog battle, and this application shocked the Reincarnation Heavenly Pavilion.

Although ten consecutive victories can apply to fight over the level, it is not really true that the Origin Upper Realm Overlord will do this.

It's like Lin Yun, who has completed a hundred consecutive victories, and has not challenged the second awakening of the Origin Upper Realm Overlord!

There is a big gap between the strength of the first awakening and the second awakening, and if you go to the competition, you will almost 100% die.

......

The depths of the Reincarnation Heavenly Pavilion.

Xuduo knew that Aochen was going to fight beyond the level, and frowned slightly.

Although Aochen's strength is very strong, the first awakening is not the same as the second awakening, the difference in strength is too big!

"Could it be that Aochen feels that the pressure is not enough to break the realm, so he has to fight beyond the level?"

He couldn't think of anything other than that.

But Aochen is eligible to apply, and he will naturally agree.

Subsequently.

The Reincarnation Heavenly Pavilion agreed to Aochen's application and will arrange Aochen's leapfrog challenge competition in the near future.

After a period of time, the leapfrog challenge competition belonging to Aochen began, and the odds were still very high, directly reaching ten times the odds.

"Ten times the odds, this can definitely make me a lot of money!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

And the odds are changing in real time, and maybe the odds can be improved.

Really.

When more and more people bet on Ye Tian's opponent, the odds are also improving.

When Ye Tian reached 1 to 12, he started to bet, and bet all of Aochen's net worth.

this day.

The race is on.

Ye Tian's opponent had already been announced, it was a Red Skull Giant with a good record, and the Overlord of the Origin Upper Realm of the Second Awakening.

The Origin Upper Realm Overlord who was able to survive the Reincarnation Heavenly Pavilion Competition, there was no weak one in the same realm, and those weak slave races had already died.

In the eyes of many reincarnation celestial clans, Ao Chen is at most comparable to the weaker Second Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords, but those who compete in the Reincarnation Heavenly Pavilion are all top Second Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords, and there is a big gap in their strength.

"You can't end the battle quickly, so let's defeat the other party at the cost of 'heavy damage' this time!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

On the Void Ring.

The battle began.

Thundered!!!!

The two sides fought and fought, Ye Tian tried his best to suppress his strength, and fought extremely desperately, fighting with his life, wanting to end the battle in a short time.

Because the longer the battle, the easier it is to be exposed.

This kind of desperate battle made the onlookers of the reincarnation Celestial Clan and those slave races enjoy a very good game.

Soon, both sides were injured, and it was not yet clear who would win or lose.

However, they were all shocked.

"Ao Chen's ability to fight with the top Second Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlord to this extent?This strength is stronger than before, it was clumsy before!"

Moreover, he also saw a clue.

Ao Chen not only completed the awakening of the bloodline, but also cultivated the special Origin Ancestor of the Other Side, the physical body is extremely powerful, and it is very strong in all aspects, so that he can fight beyond the level.

Otherwise, it would be impossible for Ao Chen to defeat a top-notch Second Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlord.

Soon.

With a mistake by the Red Skull Giant, Ye Tian hit the opponent hard, but he was also pierced by the opponent's counterattack.

But the other party was more seriously injured, and after a while, the other party took the initiative to admit defeat.

In such a game, as long as you admit defeat in time, you can end the game, and it is not necessary to divide life and death every time.

If you have to kill an Origin Upper Realm Overlord every time you compete, you won't be able to find so many slaves in the Reincarnation Heavenly Pavilion!

"Win!"

Ye Tian was in a very good mood, and when he got the betting reward in the Reincarnation Heavenly Pavilion, he was in a better mood.

But this was far from enough, if he wanted to buy a large amount of cultivation resources, he would have to play at least a few more games.

Of course.

If he wins the game again and again, the other members of the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan will feel bored, and the Reincarnation Heavenly Pavilion will not give him high odds, so he won't want to earn so many Reincarnation Heavenly Coins.

After another period of time, another game of Ye Tian arrived, and the opponent he faced in this game was even stronger.

This time, the other members of the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan were still not optimistic about Ye Tian, and the odds of the Reincarnation Heavenly Pavilion were also relatively high, with one to three.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian once again bet all of his reincarnation coins, and some people followed Ye Tian to bet together.

After all, Ye Tian had already created many miracles, and some members of the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan thought that Ao Chen might also win the game, so they also bet on it.

And this one.

Ye Tian won the game again at the cost of heavy damage, which made many members of the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan think that Ao Chen cheated, and even thought that Ao Chen was a reincarnation Celestial Clan who had awakened for the second time, and he didn't know how to hide his cultivation, which made his strength so strong.

Even the Pavilion Master of the Reincarnation Heavenly Pavilion, Xu Duo, thought that Ye Tian had cheated, but he couldn't see through it.

This possibility is not out of the question.

Moreover, he found that Ao Chen bet a lot of reincarnation coins every time and earned a lot of reincarnation coins, if he cheated to earn reincarnation coins, reincarnation heaven pavilion would definitely not allow it.

The depths of the Reincarnation Heavenly Pavilion.

Ye Tian was invited here.

Here, he met the Pavilion Master of the Reincarnation Heavenly Pavilion, Xuduo.

At this time.

Ye Tian sensed the terrifying aura on Xuduo's body, which was even stronger than the Desolate Ancestor, but it should still not have reached the ninth awakening.

Obviously, this is an eight-time awakened reincarnation Heavenly Ancestor, but the combat power should be stronger than that of the Desolate Ancestor.

"Ao Chen, what kind of cultivation are you?"

Xuduo asked.

"Lord Xuduo, I am an awakened cultivator!" Ye Tian said truthfully.

"Now many people in the clan think that you have cheated!" "Xuduo said in a deep voice: "You need to go to the ancestral monument to test it and prove your cultivation, if you are found cheating, the Reincarnation Heavenly Pavilion will take back the Reincarnation Heavenly Coin you earned!"
